results.rendered_html: 1. sāpta (von saptan)  P. 5,1,61  (varge). adj. siebenfältig, n. Siebenzahl: ratnāni triḥ sāptāni  ṚV. 1,20,7 . sapta sāptāni  TS. 5,4,7,5 . Schol. zu  P. 5,1,61 .  ŚĀṄKH. BR. 14,5 . Hierher wohl auch (oxyt.): asmāntribhiḥ sāptebhiravatam dreimal siebenmal  VĀLAKH. 11,5 .
